title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・もっかい！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan doesn't want to lose. She grits her
teeth and desperately hangs in there for the
3,200 meters of the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Gold Ship tells her to keep on
being her dumb self.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to read between the lines, Jordan takes
offense, but their rivalry will have to wait until the
Takarazuka Kinen to be settled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final leg of the Senior Spring Triple Crown
will be the perfect stage to unveil her true
potential.
